Heavy Put OI in 0DTE (7704) and MONTHLY (41976). Aligns with the WEEKLY Max Pain, establishing a deep structural floor against bearish trends.
Dominant Call OI in WEEKLY (4776) and MONTHLY (30113). Marks a hard upper boundary for the positive GEX regime.
High Call OI in 0DTE (1531) and WEEKLY (3923), accompanied by massive 0DTE Call Volume (41k). Provides immediate intraday friction above the spot price.
MONTHLY Gamma Flip positioned just below the major 615 resistance. Indicates the broader structural transition zone for dealer positioning.
Extreme MONTHLY Put OI (229k). Acts as the ultimate tail-risk support and deep hedging anchor for market makers.
